plan_summary.plan_name: Arla 'Crate Escape' Milk Crate Recovery Campaign 2026
plan_summary.primary_goal: Recover 40% (108,000) of annually lost Arla milk crates in 2026 within a 4M DKK budget while donating at least 500,000 DKK to the Arla Foundation.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Bottom-up viability of dual-channel recovery: per-crate handling cost vs logistics budget, donation spend vs donation ceiling, and combined budget surplus against the 4M DKK cap.

key_values.label: Total program budget ceiling
key_values.comment: Hard cap on total campaign expenditure; breach forces de-scope or halt.
key_values.source_text: Total program budget ceiling of 4 million DKK

key_values.label: Maximum charitable donation outlay
key_values.comment: Hard ceiling on per-crate donation spend; exceeded if returns top ~270k crates.
key_values.source_text: Maximum donation outlay of 1.35 million DKK budget component

key_values.label: Reverse logistics budget allocation
key_values.comment: Non-donation budget for collection, cleaning, transport, IT tracking; bottleneck if per-crate cost is high.

key_values.label: Marketing and campaign execution budget
key_values.comment: Allocated for social/marketing creative; reputational shock can require +500k DKK uplift.
key_values.source_text: Marketing/Campaign Execution (Incl. Social Media): 1.0 million DKK

key_values.label: Per-crate charitable donation incentive
key_values.comment: Primary behavioral nudge; drives donation outlay = incentive * crates returned.
key_values.source_text: Per-crate charitable donation anchor is 5 DKK

key_values.label: Year-one target recovered crates
key_values.comment: 40% of 270,000 annual loss; pass/fail gate for primary volume KPI.
key_values.source_text: Year one target recovery volume of 108,000 crates

key_values.label: Annual crate loss volume baseline
key_values.comment: Denominator for recovery rate; upper-bound on returns if 100% recovered.
key_values.source_text: Annual crate loss volume target of 270,000 units

key_values.label: Minimum success recovery rate
key_values.comment: Threshold for year-one viability; below 40% the primary volume goal is failed.

derived_questions.question: Does projected donation spend clear the 500,000 DKK Arla Foundation minimum?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Donations below 500k DKK fail the charitable success metric even if volume succeeds.

derived_questions.question: Does per-crate logistics cost stay within the 1.65M DKK logistics budget at target volume?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: If per-crate handling exceeds budget capacity, the program fails economic viability before hitting the 4M cap.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Per-crate reverse-logistics handling cost
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Drives total logistics spend and determines whether the 1.65M DKK logistics budget is sufficient at target volume.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Triangulate from Q2 pilot CPRC target (15.28 DKK/crate) and risk threshold (10 DKK/crate); 8-20 DKK range.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Projected year-one donation outlay
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tests whether actual recovered volume * 5 DKK incentive lands between 500k floor and 1.35M ceiling.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Compute as incentive_per_crate_dkk * expected_recovered_crates using volume scenarios (0.5x-2x target).

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Expected actual recovered crate volume
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to convert per-crate cost and incentive into projected total spend versus budget caps.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bound between 40% floor (108,000) and ~80% stress case (216,000); base near target.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Projected donation spend from expected returns
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Anchors donation budget pressure; feeds both the 500k minimum margin and the 1.35M ceiling margin.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Donation ceiling margin
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Positive value means donations fit within the 1.35M DKK ceiling; negative triggers tiered deceleration.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Recovery volume margin vs 108k target
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests the primary 40% volume gate; positive means the year-one KPI is cleared.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Total projected program spend
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Aggregates all spend streams to test against the 4M DKK ceiling.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Program budget surplus vs 4M ceiling
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Combined viability gate: positive surplus means the 4M ceiling holds across donation + logistics + marketing.

unmodelled_gates.label: Municipal triage liability transfer MoUs
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Q3 national rollout depends on signed indemnity agreements with Tier 1 municipal waste authorities; legal failure curtails the municipal channel.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Municipal channel cannot operate; volume capped below 108,000 and Q3/Q4 capacity collapses.

unmodelled_gates.label: Supermarket sign-off on irreverent marketing tone
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Salling, Coop, and Rema 1000 must approve creatives or partnerships fracture, jeopardizing the primary collection channel.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Retail partners withdraw in-store drop-off support; primary collection channel and viral marketing both fail.

unmodelled_gates.label: Food-grade sanitation certification for third-party cleaning hubs
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Cleaned crates must pass Danish food-grade standards to re-enter the dairy supply chain; non-compliance blocks reuse entirely.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Recovered crates cannot be reintroduced; 2027 new-crate production reduction goal fails regardless of volume.
